title: Shoulder Rolls
instruction: Roll your shoulders slowly backward, then forward, letting your arms stay loose.

title: Take a Lap
instruction: Walk one easy lap around your room, floor, or nearby space without checking a screen.

title: Shake It Out
instruction: Stand up and gently shake out your hands, arms, legs, and shoulders.

title: Fresh-Air Steps
instruction: Step outside and walk at an unhurried pace, noticing the air as you move.

title: Long Exhale
instruction: Breathe in comfortably, then let each exhale last a little longer than the inhale.

title: Four-Sided Breath
instruction: Inhale, pause, exhale, and pause again for an easy count of four each.

title: Three Soft Breaths
instruction: Take three quiet breaths and relax your jaw a little more with each exhale.

title: Open-Air Breath
instruction: Step outside and take five slow breaths while feeling the temperature of the air.

title: Notice Five Things
instruction: Look around slowly and name five ordinary things you can see right now.

title: Listen Near and Far
instruction: Notice one sound nearby, one farther away, and the quiet between them.

title: A Screenless Minute
instruction: Set your device down and let one minute pass without trying to fill it.

title: Watch the Sky
instruction: Step outside and spend a few minutes watching the sky without naming what you see.

title: Neck Release
instruction: Let one ear drift toward one shoulder, pause gently, then switch sides.

title: Open the Chest
instruction: Rest your forearms on a doorway and lean forward gently until your chest opens.

title: Seated Twist
instruction: Sit tall, turn gently to one side, breathe, and repeat on the other side.

title: Reach Sideways
instruction: Stand tall, reach one arm overhead, and lean gently to each side.
